rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level signal routing bindings.
Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving port directions and data types.
generic_rules: Insert AGREE contracts within annex agree blocks in valid AADL component scopes.
Ensure AGREE variable declarations align with AADL port types and directions.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Validate that all referenced identifiers are visible in the current AADL scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should define assumptions and guarantees for port features.
Implementation contracts should bind variables to subcomponent ports and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid variables.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assume/guarantee syntax and validator diagnostics
Model repair patterns and minimal repair rules
